response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and demonstrated leadership in open-source and tooling projects, including MCP-related work — aligning with key responsibilities. However, he lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise cloud AI deployment, and his AI experience is mentioned as a recent contribution rather than a core career focus.
strengths: Experienced in MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling and agentic workflows
Strong full-stack and polyglot engineering background with cloud and DevOps exposure
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and mentoring initiatives
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited documentation of enterprise cloud AI deployments or customer-facing technical leadership
